seoTitle: Bedfordale vs Beechboro — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bedfordale and Beechboro. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bedfordale and Beechboro.
heading: Bedfordale vs Beechboro — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bedfordale, Western Australia and Beechboro, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beechboro has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bedfordale (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bedfordale or Beechboro safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bedfordale has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Beechboro scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bedfordale scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Beechboro scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bedfordale or Beechboro?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beechboro has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
